description: Score-based vs ladder explorer trajectories (running-best val and holdout) across 3 independent runs per condition, for all 8 datasets under neutral framing.

notes.subsampled_to: max 50 evenly-spaced query points per dataset for JSON size; full run lengths in n_queries
notes.running_best: each value is the running-best (monotone improving) val/holdout up to that query
notes.ladder_color_in_figure: gray (#737373) — the plotting script uses '0.45' which renders as dark gray
